appName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome toolbar and Web Store

appDescription.message: Look up a chord diagram instantly, without leaving what you're playing.
appDescription.description: Extension description in the Web Store

searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the search input

pinnedHeader.description: Label above the pinned chords section

clearPinned.description: Button to remove all pinned chords

noResults.description: Message shown when search returns no results

pinAriaLabel.description: Aria label for the pin button

unpinAriaLabel.description: Aria label for the unpin button

notationAmerican.description: Aria label/title for the American notation option button

notationSpanish.description: Aria label/title for the Spanish notation option button
